name: Slide Generator Agent
description: Specialized presentation-design agent. Always asks clarifying questions about audience, structure, and takeaway, then generates a standalone HTML slide deck styled with the workspace's DeckDesignProfile.
author: Beam Hackathon Team

agents.name: Slide Generator
agents.description: Specialized presentation-design agent. Always asks clarifying questions about the presentation (audience, angle, takeaway, structure) before drafting an outline and generating a standalone HTML deck styled with the workspace's DeckDesignProfile.

settingsSchema.title: Slide Generator settings
settingsSchema.description: Where to find the workspace's DeckDesignProfile. The full brand, typography, and default-slide config lives in that JSON file — see presets/beam-default.json for the shape.

fields.label: Design profile path
fields.description: Workspace-relative path to the DeckDesignProfile JSON file. Copy presets/beam-default.json to this location to seed.

fields.label: Default preset
fields.description: Preset used when the profile file is missing or invalid. Must match a file under presets/<name>.json in this extension.

options.label: Beam Pitch Deck (dark, with About + Live Demo)
